articles.title: Bid to clean up a rotten trail in Hyderabad’s thriving food scene
articles.description: Beneath Hyderabad’s booming food economy lies a dark web of adulteration, mislabelling and unsafe practices. Of late, an unprecedented police-led crackdown is pulling back the curtain on a sprawling food fraud network that thrives on gaps in regulation and consumer trust. But as enforcement tightens and complaints surge, the city finds itself trying not just to fix a broken food chain, but also to restore faith in what lands on every plate, write Serish Nanisetti and Lavpreet Kaur

topStories.title: US waiver on Russian oil sanctions expires on 11 April — Will US extend the relaxations amid talks with Iran?
topStories.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin's special envoy Kirill Dmitriev is currently in the US, meeting US President Donald Trump's administration for discussions on a peace deal with Ukraine. It was not clear whether the talks will extend to the sanctions.

topStories.title: Iran ceasefire: Not an off-ramp for the US but a life-saving ejection seat
topStories.description: A Middle Eastern country has for the first time single-handedly checked the war-making capabilities of the US and Israel

topStories.title: Bessent, Powell warn bank CEOs about Anthropic's new ‘Mythos’ AI model — What risks did they flag?
topStories.description: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell met with bank CEOs to discuss cybersecurity risks from Anthropic's Mythos AI model.

topStories.title: Ex-Congress leader alleges abduction bid by police after being stopped for ‘traffic violation’ in Shimla
topStories.description: The incident took place near the Congress headquarters here, when the police personnel stopped the vehicle of Yudhveer Singh Bains for checking.

topStories.title: Japanese tankers head closer to Strait of Hormuz as more ships gather after US-Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: With hundreds of vessels stuck since US and Israeli strikes began at the end of February, some are now beginning to shift positions to be nearer to Hormuz. A ceasefire has pushed shipowners to begin considering options, though most say conditions are still too unclear to attempt an exit.

topStories.title: Iran-US war: Tehran denies reports of negotiators travelling to Pakistan for talks
topStories.description: Pakistan's capital is on high alert with 10,000 security personnel deployed. JD Vance is set to lead talks in Islamabad amid a fragile ceasefire between Iran and the US.

topStories.title: Kevin Warsh Fed chair nomination hearing reportedly delayed — When is next hearing, what's causing hold-up
topStories.description: Kevin Warsh's nomination hearing for Federal Reserve chair has been delayed, leaving the confirmation timeline unclear. Details here.

topStories.description: A Pakistan-brokered US-Iran ceasefire has taken effect but disputes over its scope are fuelling regional tensions.

dailyNews.title: Artemis II nears end of historic mission with splashdown off California coast
dailyNews.description: Artemis II is set to splash down off San Diego as Navy crews prepare to recover the Orion capsule and the four astronauts inside, drawing crowds along the coast.

dailyNews.title: Why Melania Trump is denying alleged smears related to Jeffrey Epstein–and wants victims to testify
dailyNews.description: Melania Trump shocked reporters with a live White House speech denying ties to Jeffrey Epstein, calling fake images and smears politically motivated.

dailyNews.title: Trump blasts Biden admin for releasing illegal immigrant now charged in fatal hammer attack on Florida mother
dailyNews.description: President blasts Biden for releasing a Haitian immigrant now accused of fatally bludgeoning a woman with a hammer at a Florida gas station last week.

dailyNews.title: Coast Guard seizes over 4,500 pounds of cocaine worth $34M from suspected narco-terrorist vessel on Easter
dailyNews.description: DHS says the Coast Guard recovered more than 4,500 pounds of cocaine off the coast of Ecuador as part of Operation Pacific Viper counter-drug efforts.

dailyNews.title: ICE says more criminal migrants arrested on 1-year anniversary of program to support victims of migrant crime
dailyNews.description: ICE said it had arrested more illegal migrants with criminal convictions, coinciding with the one-year anniversary of the agency’s program supporting victims of migrant crime.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court blocks candidate after alleged GOP infiltration scheme exposed
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court rejected a progressive candidate's bid to enter Ohio's Republican primary after he allegedly misrepresented his party affiliation.

dailyNews.title: MAN VS MACHINE: Philadelphians aren't taking kindly to sharing sidewalks with delivery robots
dailyNews.description: Philadelphia residents are clashing with Uber Eats delivery robots, with incidents of kicking and sitting on the autonomous sidewalk couriers reported.

dailyNews.title: Child among 4 dead as accused arsonist allegedly drank beer during chaos
dailyNews.description: Roman Amatitla was charged with murder and arson after allegedly setting a random Queens building fire that killed four, including a 3-year-old girl.

dailyNews.title: Neighbor fatally shoots alleged gunman after 2 women shot in domestic dispute
dailyNews.description: A Washington state man allegedly shot two female relatives in a domestic dispute before a neighbor intervened and fatally shot him, police said.

dailyNews.title: California school board member refuses to follow state’s sanctuary policies, citing 'rule of law'
dailyNews.description: A California school district is defying the state's guidance on immigration enforcement. Trustee Andrew Hayes says the policy is fearmongering to advance Gavin Newsom's agenda.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump's forceful Epstein denial draws bipartisan support from lawmakers
dailyNews.description: First lady Melania Trump denounced allegations tying her to Jeffrey Epstein, prompting bipartisan calls for congressional hearings and accountability.

topStories.description: Bruce Springsteen sparked controversy with a fiery anti-Trump speech, but critics point out his reported $1.2 billion net worth undercuts his message.

topStories.title: Amid Trump’s Threats, NATO Labors to Survive the Iran War
topStories.description: President Trump is citing the unwillingness of European nations to back the United States in the conflict as another reason to scale back or abandon the alliance. And he still wants Greenland.

topStories.title: Melania Trump Says She Was Not Associated With Jeffrey Epstein
topStories.description: Responding to what she said were smears, the first lady said she never had knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein’s abuse and was not a victim of his. She called for a congressional hearing for his victims.

topStories.title: How Trump Purged Immigration Judges to Speed Up Deportations
topStories.description: Judges are ordering an unprecedented number of people deported after coming under significant pressure from the administration to do so or risk losing their jobs.

topStories.title: The Civilization Trump Destroys May Be Our Own

topStories.title: Jimmy Kimmel Salutes Melania’s White House Surprise
topStories.description: The first lady addressed her relationship with Jeffrey Epstein in a prepared statement that the talk show host called “better than her movie.”

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Iran against charging tolls to go through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Only about a dozen ships passed through the Strait of Hormuz in the first two days of the ceasefire, far below normal traffic levels before the war, data shows.

dailyNews.title: 4/9: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: President Trump says he asked Netanyahu to scale back Lebanon strikes; Melania Trump makes a rare statement denying relationship with Jeffrey Epstein.

dailyNews.title: Trump criticizes NATO after talks with Rutte
dailyNews.description: President Trump bashed NATO after meeting with Secretary General Mark Rutte on Wednesday. Ken Thomas, national politics reporter for the Wall Street Journal and Dave Levinthal, senior editor for NOTUS, joined "The Takeout" to discuss that and some of the day's other top political headlines.

dailyNews.title: White House staff received email warning not to place bets on prediction markets
dailyNews.description: White House aides got an email last month telling them not to place bets on prediction markets with nonpublic information, multiple administration officials told CBS News.

dailyNews.title: A mother mourning the son she lost in the Iran war says she told Trump: 'Go get 'em'
dailyNews.description: More than a month after her son, Maj. Cody Khork, died in the Iran war, Donna Burhans has found a routine that helps her cope.

dailyNews.title: Exclusive: Cuban president reacts to Trump admin’s call for him to step down
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel says "stepping down [is] not part of our vocabulary" amid reports that the U.S. government has asked the Cuban leader to resign.

dailyNews.description: President Trump's nomination of Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair already faced a hurdle by Sen. Thom Tillis over a probe of current chair Jerome Powell.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran 'better stop now' if it's charging oil tankers fees to go through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said that Iran "better stop now" if it's charging fees to oil tankers passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices rise as U.S.-Iran ceasefire fails to boost tanker traffic via Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday warned Iran to "stop now" if it was charging tankers to transit the Strait of Hormuz.
